bead.title: bead store: migrate Init and GenID to ctx-first signatures
bead.description:
PROBLEM
TD-027 requires the foundational bead Store surface to become typed and ctx-first, but setup and ID generation still accept untyped variadic arguments. This preserves the legacy no-context API shape and keeps part of the oversized ddx-464feba2 migration bundled with unrelated callers.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
- cli/internal/bead/backend.go:74-89 declares the TD-027 foundation interfaces, but BeadInitializer still exposes Init(args ...any) instead of Init(ctx context.Context).
- cli/internal/bead/store.go:134-141 implements storeCallContext(args), which allows context to be optional and hidden in variadic arguments.
- cli/internal/bead/store.go:148-179 exposes Store.Init(args ...any) and Store.GenID(args ...any).

PROPOSED FIX
Change only Store.Init and Store.GenID to typed ctx-first signatures: Init(ctx context.Context) error and GenID(ctx context.Context) (string, error). Update BeadInitializer in cli/internal/bead/backend.go for Init. Migrate only Init and GenID callsites across the repo to pass context explicitly so the full module still builds under lefthook. Add deterministic bead package tests for canceled-context behavior.

NON-SCOPE
- Read APIs: ReadAll, ReadAllFiltered, Get, and GetWithArchive.
- Mutation APIs: Create, Update, and Close.
- Event method ctx threading: AppendEvent, Events, and EventsByKind.
- Removing workflow helper methods beyond the foundational signatures this bead changes.
- Caller migration unrelated to Init and GenID.

GOVERNING ARTIFACT
- TD-027.

PARENT/DEPS
- Parent/split source: ddx-464feba2.
- Deps: no additional deps; this child can land independently of the read and mutation signature children.
bead.acceptance:
1. cli/internal/bead/store.go exposes Init(ctx context.Context) error and GenID(ctx context.Context) (string, error), and those two methods no longer parse context through storeCallContext.
2. cli/internal/bead/backend.go exposes BeadInitializer.Init(ctx context.Context) error.
3. All Go callsites for Store.Init and Store.GenID pass an explicit context; zero-argument Store.Init() and Store.GenID() call patterns are removed.
4. Add or update deterministic tests named TestStoreInit_RejectsCanceledContext and TestStoreGenID_RejectsCanceledContext.
5. cd cli && go test ./internal/bead/... -run 'TestStore(Init|GenID)_RejectsCanceledContext' passes.
6. cd cli && go test ./internal/bead/... passes.
7. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
